info.title: LedFx REST API
info.description:
OpenAPI description of the LedFx REST API, reconstructed from the project documentation.

Notes:
- Most endpoints return HTTP 200 for both success and failure, with status conveyed in the JSON body (snackbar-friendly). Inspect the `status` field.
- Several endpoints accept request bodies on GET (e.g. /api/config, /api/schema/, /api/integrations) to request subsets; this is non-standard but matches LedFx behavior. Some HTTP clients/Postman support GET bodies.
- WebSocket surfaces (/api/log WS upgrade, the /api/clients message protocol, and all event streams) are not fully modeled; OpenAPI does not describe WebSocket messaging.
- Endpoints marked '(upcoming)' in the docs may not be implemented yet.

get.summary: Get configuration (full, or subset by key)
get.description: No body returns the full config. Optionally POST/send a single key string or an array of keys to retrieve a subset. Permitted keys: host, port, port_s, dev_mode, configuration_version, scan_on_startup, visualisation_fps, visualisation_maxlen, audio, melbanks, wled_preferences, devices, virtuals, integrations, scenes, user_presets, ledfx_presets, flush_on_deactivate

put.summary: Update permitted config keys (may trigger restart)

post.description: Provide a full, valid config. LedFx restarts to apply.

delete.summary: Reset config to defaults and restart
delete.description: WARNING: irreversibly deletes all devices and settings.

get.description: GET with WebSocket Upgrade. Streams backend log messages in real time (sends up to 30 recent on connect). OpenAPI cannot model the WS stream; documented for reference.

post.description: ASCII only (non-ASCII stripped), max 200 chars, rate-limited 1/sec per IP.

get.description: Permitted: devices, effects, integrations, virtuals, audio, melbanks, wled_preferences, core

post.summary: Find & add WLED devices on LAN
Request Nanoleaf auth token (controller must be in pairing mode)

fallback.description: Same semantics as per-virtual endpoints; null allowed.

get.summary: Get all presets for an effect

delete.summary: Delete a user preset (path params only)
Delete a specific color/gradient by ID

post.description: segments is a list of [device_id, start, end, invert].

put.description: Config "RANDOMIZE" generates random values. Optional fallback param.

post.summary: Remove an effect type from stored config

get.summary: Get presets for active effect (with active flag)

put.summary: Set active effect to a preset

post.summary: Save active effect as a custom preset
Add oneshot to a specific virtual

put.summary: force_color, calibration, highlight, oneshot, or copy
Control: start / stop / pause / resume / next / prev / state

get.description: Optional body {"info": <field>} where field is one of id, type, active, status, data, config.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: User path, builtin:// prefix, or http(s):// URL.

post.summary: Retrieve an image as base64 JPEG
Extract GIF/animated frames as base64 JPEGs

get.description: Returns a map of client UID -> metadata. (The broader /api/clients client-management surface is a WebSocket message protocol not modeled here.)

server_url.description: Must start with ws:// or wss://

id.description: Optional on create; slug-generated from name if omitted.

config.description: Required when action=activate unless preset is provided.

id.description: Omit on create; required on update.

path_url.description: Remote http(s) URL or local file path within config/assets dir.
